hero.eyebrow: Houston & Katy, TX · Specialty Coffee · Est. 2025
hero.tagline: Latin-inspired specialty coffee, tropical matchas, and fresh-baked pastries. Your new morning ritual.

season.subtitle: Crafted with intention. Flavors that hit different every time.

about.body: KÜL Café was born from a simple truth — your morning should feel like something. Not rushed. Not generic. Warm, social, and a little unexpected. Latin-inspired flavors, specialty coffee, and fresh baked goods that make you want to stay a while.

ritual.step1_desc: Leave the rush outside. KÜL is a space that breathes — warm, social, and designed to make you stay a little longer.
ritual.step2_desc: A horchata latte. A guava cream matcha. A fresh-baked empanada straight from the oven. Nothing generic here.
ritual.step3_desc: Good coffee brings people together. This place feels good. You'll want to come back — and you will.

gallery.subtitle: Fotos reales, momentos reales. Así se ve quedarse KÜL.

cta.subtitle: Tu nuevo ritual matutino te espera. Entra, desacelera, y disfruta algo genuinamente diferente.

footer.tagline: Stay KÜL · Houston & Katy, TX · Est. 2025
footer.copy: Latin-inspired specialty coffee, fresh baked goods, and a space to slow down. Made with love in Houston, TX.
